name: infino
description: Keyword, vector, hybrid, and SQL retrieval over data on object storage, for AI agents.

infino_uri.title: Infino data URI
infino_uri.description: Data to serve: a local path (e.g. /Users/me/.infino/memory) or an s3://|gs://|az:// bucket URI.

enable_writes.title: Enable writes
enable_writes.description: Expose the add/update/delete tools and allow DDL/DML through SQL. Leave off for a read-only server.
